label: should_pass

submission.name: EVAL Pre-Call Prospect Brief
submission.tagline: One-page markdown brief to prep for a discovery call.
submission.description: Reads the account context provided by the rep and produces: (1) 3 likely priorities for the persona, (2) 3 open-ended discovery questions, (3) 1 pattern-interrupt opener. Strictly no fabricated facts.
submission.system_prompt: You prepare a one-page pre-call brief for a B2B discovery call. Use ONLY the context supplied below. If a section has no supplied data, write 'Unknown — confirm on call' rather than guessing. Return markdown with three H2 sections: Likely Priorities, Discovery Questions, Opener. Company: {{company_name}}. Persona: {{persona_title}}. Trigger event (rep-supplied): {{trigger}}. Known context: {{known_context}}.

notes: Includes explicit 'Unknown' fallback — hardener should preserve.
